notes: Stage 1 complete: Baseline 5.50ms, no consistent improvement achieved
torch.compile fails on conv due to Triton/ROCm compatibility
Triton BN+ReLU fusion shows ~1.18x speedup (4.62ms) but has persistent correctness issues
Conv-BN fusion failed because BN running stats are uninitialized at model construction
Future work: Debug Triton kernel channel indexing more carefully, try post-hoc fusion after weight loading
